name_cn:
Sheepskin Green/Gold
🌈 Latest hot mini sheepskin shoulder bag clutch makeup bag is in stock! Wrap-around zip clutch, adorned with LE CASSANDRE and diamond quilting, sheepskin lining, antique brass zipper closure with a card slot. This versatile piece features a leather top handle and an adjustable detachable shoulder strap, can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody!
Model: 766731 [Original Leather]
Size: 18×11×6.5cm
